# nested-project

## Getting Started

### Prerequisites

```bash
curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh
```

### Quick Start

```bash
cargo run
```

## Development

### Dev Server

```bash
cargo watch -x run
```

### Building

```bash
cargo build --release
```

### Testing

```bash
cargo test
```
